problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
